title: cineraria alchemilloides subsp. alchemilloides
intro: Cineraria alchemilloides subsp. alchemilloides, also known as Cape marigold, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Cineraria alchemilloides subsp. alchemilloides include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect cells from damage. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Cineraria alchemilloides subsp. alchemilloides can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
